failed_attempts:
intro x hx
  have h : 0 < x := hx
  have h₁ : 0 < 2 * x := mul_pos two_pos h
  field_simp [h₁.ne']
  rw [le_div_iff h₁]
  nlinarith [sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num), sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2)]

intro x hx
  have h : 0 < x := hx
  have h2 : 0 < 2 * x := mul_pos two_pos h
  field_simp [h2.ne']
  rw [div_le_iff h2]
  nlinarith [sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num), Real.sqrt_nonneg 2,
    sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2)]

intro x hx
  have h : 0 < x := hx
  have h₁ : 0 < 2 * x := mul_pos two_pos h
  have h₂ : 0 < Real.sqrt 2 := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by norm_num)
  have h₃ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by

    nlinarith [sq_sqrt (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2),
      sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2)]
